"'''Soup's On: The Pipe Smoker's Tale'''" is a short story about [[Dannik Jerriko]] that takes place in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. [[Jennifer Roberson]] wrote the story for ''[[Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina]]'', which [[Bantam Spectra]] published in [[August]] [[1995]].

==Plot summary==
[[Dannik Jerriko]], a [[Millennium/Legends|thousand-year-old]] [[Anzat (species)|Anzati]] vampire, coolly eyes potential prey in the [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]]. His hungry gaze lingers on [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], but they depart before he can strike.
